30.reason: [When popping, the top index points to the next available slot, so the actual top element is at stack[top-1]. Accessing stack[top] reads an uninitialized or out-of-bound value.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When popping, the top index points to the next available slot, so the actual top element is at stack[top-1]. Accessing stack[top] reads an uninitialized or out-of-bound value.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [When popping, the top index points to the next available slot, so the actual top element is at stack[top-1]. Accessing stack[top] reads an uninitialized or out-of-bound value.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [When popping, the current top index points to the next empty slot; thus, stack[top] is uninitialized or out of valid data range. It should be stack[top-1].]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [When popping, the current top index points to the next empty slot; thus, stack[top] is out of bounds. It should be stack[top-1].]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [When popping, the current top index points to the next empty slot; thus, stack[top] is out of bounds. It should be stack[top-1].]
